summary: TrustLayer demo coverage is strongest on static code, fixture evidence, route-to-resource mapping, replayable safety narratives, and a dedicated artifact consistency verifier. Production-only network and IAM validation remain intentionally out of scope.
partial: Session trust reasoning across fake persona flows
Resource-scoped access narratives without a real tenant backend
Operational review process and service-account ownership semantics

buckets.label: Supported
buckets.note: These are the stage-ready surfaces that map directly to the seven seeded scenarios.

buckets.label: Partial
buckets.note: These are represented strongly enough for narration, but still intentionally stop short of implementing a real privileged system.

buckets.label: Unsupported
buckets.note: Kept out of scope so the repo stays local, deterministic, and safe.
